creator: olivier@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 253367
patch

Here is an upgrade to latest version:
- master site changed to the new one (there is a copy on github too, but the old sourceforge page mention CodeBerg so I’ve used this one
- Allmost all previous patches removed (I think they are useless now)
- It requiere the IANA enterprise-numbers database now. I’ve checked the pkgsource port, and they added a new full port only for this file. But as ipmitool the only consummer, I’ve choose to include this file here.
- It need more test with the freeipmi port’s options

Regards,
Olivier
